scripts.dev: npx kill-port 5000 && concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.check:backend: node --check backend/app.js && node --check backend/index.js && node --check backend/config/validateEnv.js && node --check backend/middleware/rateLimiters.js && node --check backend/middleware/authMiddleware.js && node --check backend/utils/asyncHandler.js && node --check backend/utils/sendEmail.js && node --check backend/utils/userAccess.js && node --check backend/utils/syncWorkerProfile.js && node --check backend/services/otpService.js && node --check backend/models/OTP.js && node --check backend/models/PasswordReset.js && node --check backend/models/WorkerModels.js && node --check backend/controllers/authController.js && node --check backend/controllers/bookingController.js && node --check backend/controllers/chatController.js && node --check backend/controllers/marketplaceController.js && node --check backend/controllers/workerController.js && node --check backend/controllers/adminController.js && node --check backend/controllers/notificationController.js && node --check backend/scripts/seed.js
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run check:backend && npm test --prefix backend
